steps.title: Compare the two outputs
steps.content:
The linear function has the same output at two different inputs:
$$
f(0)=4
$$
$$
f(9)=4
$$
So its slope is:
$$
\frac{4-4}{9-0}=0
$$

steps.title: Write the constant function
steps.content: A linear function with slope $0$ and output $4$ is: $$ f(x)=4 $$ The answer is C.
